name: agents-playbook
description: A portable, agent-first playbook engine: a master playbook.yaml that indexes skills + processes, a friction-free loop CLI with enforced executable acceptance checks, and agent records that roll up into human reports. Everything lives in the folder (carry-on).

scripts.test: node scripts/test-anchor-selective.mjs && node scripts/test-hollow-validate.mjs && node scripts/test-q5.mjs && node scripts/test-report-gates.mjs && node scripts/test-loop-epochs.mjs && node scripts/test-next-claim-guard.mjs && node scripts/test-loop-fresh.mjs && node scripts/test-mode-plan-validation.mjs && node scripts/test-trust-safety.mjs && node scripts/test-autonomous-loop.mjs && node scripts/test-win32-runner.mjs && node scripts/test-pack-manifest.mjs && node scripts/test-pack-build.mjs && node scripts/test-pack-install.mjs && node scripts/test-pack-roundtrip.mjs
